name: VigIA
slogan: La diferencia entre mirar y entender.
shortDescription: Transformamos cámaras de seguridad en sistemas de inteligencia activa.

whyToUse.description: Transform your existing security cameras into intelligent monitoring systems with real-time analytics and alerts.
Receive instant notifications for detected events, ensuring you never miss critical moments.
Seamlessly connect your cameras with our platform in minutes, without complex setup or technical expertise.
